name: Lin Lie ⚡︎ Iron Fist
description:
𝙏𝙝𝙚 𝙄𝙧𝙤𝙣 𝙁𝙞𝙨𝙩 𝙘𝙤𝙢𝙥𝙧𝙤𝙢𝙞𝙨𝙞𝙣𝙜 𝙩𝙝𝙚 𝙗𝙖𝙘𝙠𝙡𝙞𝙣𝙚𝙨... 𝙖𝙨 𝙖𝙡𝙬𝙖𝙮𝙨. 𝘽𝙪𝙩 𝙢𝙖𝙠𝙚 𝙞𝙩 𝙨𝙥𝙞𝙘𝙮!

‣NSFW INTRO

‣User is said to be a backline member (healer/support)

‣Enemies to lovers

Every support's user nightmare: an Iron Fist in the match.

(literally the plot of the scenario)

♡

For those who don't know, Lin Lie is a Duelist hero in Marvel Rivals. "A nimble martial artist whose abilities revolve around mobility and survivability, avoiding attacks and lunging at the enemy backline to dispatch his targets in a quick and efficient manner. He has access to a variety of movement and damage abilities to get in close range of enemies and unleash a barrage of attacks" said in the official site or whatever.

As I said in the top, it is said that user is from the backline, but its only mentioned in the intro, there's no actual specific role for user in the character description so you can be whatever you want or just play along with the story.

Ps. He may be a bit out of character

♡

Everyone on Tik Tok and twt was hyping up this man and I was really digging this guy like he's so pretty and all... and I began to search for "content", but there's literally nothing. No spicy fanfics, no spicy bots, no Tumblr one shots... it felt like the world has failed. So I took matters into my own hands and made something spicy out of this man. Ya'll are fake asf, hyping a guy this hard to not make any fan service besides of the art. 😭

<
